_comment: List of non-AI remote services used by this project. Required by QVAC Hackathon rules.
_note: No cloud AI services are used. All inference runs 100% locally via QVAC SDK.

services.name: HuggingFace
services.purpose: One-time download of GGUF model files (MedPsy-4B, embedding model)

services.name: Google Fonts
services.purpose: Typography (Inter font family) for web UI; falls back to system fonts if offline
